message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Sync beads database with git-backed JSONL after documentation
session work. Updates include:

- Closed TypeScript tsserver narrowing analyzer issue (stk)
- Closed type narrowing heuristics fallback issue (un4)
- Closed cross-language type narrowing heuristics issue (8d7)
- Closed type narrowing fixtures + manifest issue (46h)
- Various status updates from exploration and audit work

This commit maintains the shared project state for multi-agent
coordination via the beads issue tracker.
